title: anogra pallida
intro: Anogra pallida, also known as Anogeissus latifolia, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical forests of Africa and Asia. The bark of the Anogra pallida tree has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Anogra pallida include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Anogra pallida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
intro_study: According to the given study, Anogeissus (also referred to as Anogra pallida) benefits include having antioxidant, antimicrobial, wound healing, antiulcer, anti-inflammation, anti-diabetics, hepatoprotective, hypolipidemic, antiparasitic and neuroprotective effects.
